scripts.build: cd packages/opentui && bun run build && cd ../app && bun run build
scripts.test: cd packages/opentui && bun run test && cd ../app && bun run test && cd ../pi && bun run test
scripts.typecheck: cd packages/opentui && bun run typecheck && cd ../app && bun run typecheck && cd ../pi && bun run typecheck
scripts.pack:check: cd packages/opentui && bun run pack:check && cd ../app && bun run pack:check && cd ../pi && bun run pack:check
scripts.check: bun run format:check && bun run lint && bun run test && bun run typecheck
